title: New Year Party 新年聚会
scene: 全家人聚在一起迎接新年倒计时。

lines.en: Mom, what time is it? Is it almost midnight?
lines.zh: 妈妈，几点了？快到午夜了吗？

lines.en: It is eleven fifty. Ten more minutes!
lines.zh: 十一点五十了。还有十分钟！

lines.en: I made a New Year wish. Can I tell you?
lines.zh: 我许了新年愿望。能告诉你吗？

lines.en: You can tell me after the countdown.
Happy New Year, Mom! I love you!
I love you too! Let us eat the cake together.
lines.zh: 我也爱你！我们一起吃蛋糕吧。
